_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. bootstrap.ps1 reads this to substitute machine placeholders. Leave a value as null to let the installer auto-detect it.
_vaultRoot: Where the Obsidian vault (the contents of ./vault) will be installed. Required.
_userHome: Your home dir. null = auto ($env:USERPROFILE). The contents of ./claude-global install into <userHome>\.claude.
_pythonExe: Absolute path to Python 3.12+. null = auto (Get-Command python).
_taskUser: DOMAIN\user that scheduled tasks run as. null = auto ($env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME).
_registerScheduledTasks: If true, bootstrap registers the 38 tasks in runtime/scheduled-tasks after substituting placeholders. Review them first; default false.
_installDaemons: If true, copies runtime/daemons launchers into <userHome> homes (~/.afk-code-claude2 etc). You still must supply tokens separately.
